data.name: HistoryText2
data.value: We are a group of people who love traveling and have gained tourism experience in international markets. Additionally, we have been involved in property management, leasing, renovations, and real estate trading for over 6 years. We want to offer the experience we have gained to our clients and guests, who are always satisfied with our services.

data.name: MissionText2
data.value: Providing the best possible service to our clients, both guests and apartment owners. It is particularly important to us to maintain a high standard of customer service and to ensure our guests that they will feel at home in our apartments and can count on our help at any time.

data.name: TomaszText1
data.value: Visionary and strategist with experience in the real estate industry. He built Rentoom to simplify short-term rentals and automate everything possible—from bookings to guest management.

data.name: KamilText
data.value: He ensures that Rentoom's technology is fast, reliable, and secure. A passionate advocate for automation and modern solutions for the rental market.

data.name: MartaText1
data.value: Coordinates daily operations with attention to every detail. Thanks to her, our clients can rest easy—everything runs on time and without a hitch.
